name: hover
description: AI that hovers over your dev workflow. Natural language frontend testing.

scripts.dev:example:basic-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter basic-app dev
scripts.dev:example:stock-registration: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter stock-registration dev
scripts.dev:example:canvas-paint: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter canvas-paint dev
scripts.dev:example:e-commerce: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter e-commerce dev
scripts.dev:example:astro-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter astro-app dev
scripts.dev:example:nuxt-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter nuxt-app dev
scripts.dev:example:next-app: pnpm --filter @hover-dev/core build && pnpm --filter @hover-dev/widget-bootstrap build && pnpm --filter @hover-dev/next build && concurrently -k -n core,widget,next -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @hover-dev/core dev" "pnpm --filter @hover-dev/widget-bootstrap dev" "pnpm --filter next-app dev"
scripts.dev:example:webpack-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter webpack-app dev
scripts.dev:example:rn-web-app: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx/esm" pnpm --filter rn-web-app dev
